title: Rajeshwari's NYC Spots
author: Rajeshwari Kotwal
description: A personal guide to my favorite spots in New York City

spots.name: Washington Square Park
spots.best_for: people watching and spontaneous chess games

spots.name: Tompkins Square Park
spots.best_for: sitting under a tree with a coffee and doing nothing

spots.name: The High Line
spots.best_for: long walks when you need to think
spots.go_when: early morning before the tourists arrive

spots.name: Levain Bakery
spots.best_for: the best chocolate chip walnut cookie of your life

spots.name: Brooklyn Bridge Park
spots.best_for: Manhattan skyline views at golden hour

spots.name: Strand Bookstore
spots.best_for: getting lost for two hours and leaving with five books you didn't plan to buy

spots.name: Joe's Pizza
spots.best_for: a $3 slice that beats every fancy restaurant

spots.name: The Met
spots.best_for: getting lost in a different century for an afternoon
spots.go_when: Friday evening when it stays open late
